title: mod pack for avaritia
description: A progression-focused modpack built around Avaritia and tech mods. Automate, explore, and craft your way toward powerful endgame gear like the Infinity Sword. Designed for multiplayer and long-term challenges, with full client-server compatibility.
body:
Key Features:
Extreme Endgame Gear
Unlock absurdly powerful weapons and armor using Avaritia's Extreme Crafting Table. Work toward the Infinity Sword, World Breaker, and more.

Automation & Tech Progression
Build advanced production systems using mods like:

Thermal Expansion

Mekanism

Draconic Evolution

Refined Storage or Applied Energistics 2

Multiplayer Support
Fully compatible with Essentials and designed to run smoothly on both client and server. Ideal for private servers or co-op gameplay.

Quality of Life Improvements
Includes mods like:

JEI (Just Enough Items) for recipe viewing

JourneyMap for better navigation

Inventory Tweaks, Fast Leaf Decay, and other enhancements

Massive Resource Scaling
You’ll need massive quantities of resources—this pack encourages building quarry systems, mob farms, and fully automated crafting pipelines to progress.
